channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-18370] lustre-rsync-test ZFS crash
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Alexander Boyko <c17825@cray.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/6e5d817e-e42f-49c5-9b38-6ef9bca03fe5

test_3b failed with the following error:

onyx-147vm12 crashed during lustre-rsync-test test_3b

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/108223 - 4.18.0-513.24.1.el8_9.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/108223 - 4.18.0-513.24.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

This crashes with LU-18218 patches. I'm able to reproduce it locally on a single node with 2GB memory. With 4GB mem it is not reproduced. I do think that the main problem is ZFS bad error handling and operation on low memory environment.
why it is not seen without LU-18218? I guess because of many parallel write operations which were introduced for a changelog. There is no such problems with LDISKFS subsystem.

[  946.789304] BUG: unable to handle kernel NULL pointer dereference at 0000000000000048
[  946.794069] PGD 0 P4D 0 
[  946.794571] Oops: 0000 [#1] SMP PTI
[  946.795220] CPU: 1 PID: 11997 Comm: z_wr_int Kdump: loaded Tainted: P           OE    --------- -  - 4.18.0-513.24.1.el8_lustre.x86_64 #1
[  946.797295] Hardware name: Red Hat KVM, BIOS 0.5.1 01/01/2011
[  946.798300] RIP: 0010:dbuf_write_physdone+0x29/0x40 [zfs]
[  946.799607] Code: 90 0f 1f 44 00 00 55 48 89 d5 53 48 89 fb 48 8b 7a 20 e8 2a 36 01 00 31 d2 48 8b 8b 88 00 00 00 48 89 c7 48 8b 85 30 01 00 00 <8b> 40 48 48 f7 b3 88 03 00 00 5b 48 89 ca 5d 48 63 f0 e9 30 16 05
[  946.802707] RSP: 0018:ffffb6c802c2bd80 EFLAGS: 00010246
[  946.803636] RAX: 0000000000000000 RBX: ffff9b997569c500 RCX: 000000000000015a
[  946.804864] RDX: 0000000000000000 RSI: ffff9b9941204230 RDI: ffff9b9a5d7a7000
[  946.806095] RBP: ffff9b9a5d5a4780 R08: ffff9b9941728508 R09: ffff9b9a436166c8
[  946.807323] R10: 0000000000000000 R11: 000000000000000b R12: 00000000ffffffff
[  946.808550] R13: 0000000000080000 R14: 000000000000001b R15: ffff9b9a43616680
[  946.809775] FS:  0000000000000000(0000) GS:ffff9b9a7bd00000(0000) knlGS:0000000000000000
[  946.811155] CS:  0010 DS: 0000 ES: 0000 CR0: 0000000080050033
[  946.812160] CR2: 0000000000000048 CR3: 000000008c410002 CR4: 00000000003706e0
[  946.813391] DR0: 0000000000000000 DR1: 0000000000000000 DR2: 0000000000000000
[  946.814622] DR3: 0000000000000000 DR6: 00000000fffe0ff0 DR7: 0000000000000400
[  946.815847] Call Trace:
[  946.816360]  ? __die_body+0x1a/0x60
[  946.817034]  ? no_context+0x1ba/0x3f0
[  946.817717]  ? __bad_area_nosemaphore+0x16c/0x1c0
[  946.818556]  ? do_page_fault+0x37/0x12d
[  946.819251]  ? page_fault+0x1e/0x30
[  946.819919]  ? dbuf_write_physdone+0x29/0x40 [zfs]
[  946.820827]  zio_vdev_io_assess+0x138/0x260 [zfs]
[  946.821772]  zio_execute+0x90/0xf0 [zfs]
[  946.822577]  taskq_thread+0x2e1/0x510 [spl]
[  946.823380]  ? wake_up_q+0x70/0x70
[  946.824016]  ? zio_taskq_member.isra.11.constprop.17+0x70/0x70 [zfs]
[  946.825211]  ? taskq_thread_spawn+0x50/0x50 [spl]
[  946.826053]  kthread+0x134/0x150
[  946.826673]  ? set_kthread_struct+0x50/0x50
[  946.827430]  ret_from_fork+0x35/0x40
[  946.828105] Modules linked in: osp(OE) mdd(OE) lod(OE) mdt(OE) lfsck(OE) mgs(OE) mgc(OE) osd_zfs(OE) lquota(OE) lustre(OE) mdc(OE) lov(OE) osc(OE) lmv(OE) fid(OE) fld(OE) ksocklnd(OE) ptlrpc(OE) obdclass(OE) lnet(OE) zfs(POE) zunicode(POE) zzstd(OE) zlua(OE) zavl(POE) icp(POE) zcommon(POE) znvpair(POE) spl(OE) libcfs(OE) dm_mod rpcsec_gss_krb5 auth_rpcgss nfsv4 dns_resolver nfs lockd grace fscache sunrpc intel_rapl_msr intel_rapl_common crct10dif_pclmul crc32_pclmul ghash_clmulni_intel joydev pcspkr virtio_balloon i2c_piix4 ext4 mbcache jbd2 ata_generic ata_piix libata crc32c_intel serio_raw virtio_net net_failover virtio_blk failover
[  946.837427] CR2: 0000000000000048

[ 1132.798442] list_del corruption. prev->next should be ffff8ff5244dc828, but was ffff8ff542339dc8
[ 1132.803435] ------------[ cut here ]------------
[ 1132.804227] kernel BUG at lib/list_debug.c:53!
[ 1132.805010] invalid opcode: 0000 [#1] SMP PTI
[ 1132.805773] CPU: 0 PID: 12017 Comm: dp_sync_taskq Kdump: loaded Tainted: P           OE    --------- -  - 4.18.0-513.24.1.el8_lustre.x86_64 #1
[ 1132.807803] Hardware name: Red Hat KVM, BIOS 0.5.1 01/01/2011
[ 1132.808830] RIP: 0010:__list_del_entry_valid.cold.1+0x34/0x48
[ 1132.809833] Code: de b3 ad e8 ea 72 c7 ff 0f 0b 48 c7 c7 00 df b3 ad e8 dc 72 c7 ff 0f 0b 48 89 f2 48 89 fe 48 c7 c7 c0 de b3 ad e8 c8 72 c7 ff <0f> 0b 48 89 fe 48 c7 c7 88 de b3 ad e8 b7 72 c7 ff 0f 0b 90 48 85
[ 1132.812762] RSP: 0018:ffffa16802c0fb50 EFLAGS: 00010246
[ 1132.813635] RAX: 0000000000000054 RBX: ffff8ff5244dc800 RCX: 0000000000000000
[ 1132.814793] RDX: 0000000000000000 RSI: ffff8ff5bfc1e698 RDI: ffff8ff5bfc1e698
[ 1132.815946] RBP: ffff8ff542339c80 R08: 0000000000000000 R09: c0000000ffff7fff
[ 1132.817104] R10: 0000000000000001 R11: ffffa16802c0f970 R12: ffff8ff542339c80
[ 1132.818274] R13: ffff8ff5244dc828 R14: ffff8ff541a4c000 R15: ffff8ff5052090c0
[ 1132.819434] FS:  0000000000000000(0000) GS:ffff8ff5bfc00000(0000) knlGS:0000000000000000
[ 1132.820752] CS:  0010 DS: 0000 ES: 0000 CR0: 0000000080050033
[ 1132.821703] CR2: 00007f55eda88040 CR3: 000000003ee10001 CR4: 00000000001706f0
[ 1132.822867] Call Trace:
[ 1132.823355]  ? __die_body+0x1a/0x60
[ 1132.823979]  ? die+0x2a/0x50
[ 1132.824494]  ? do_trap+0xe7/0x110
[ 1132.825069]  ? __list_del_entry_valid.cold.1+0x34/0x48
[ 1132.825932]  ? do_invalid_op+0x36/0x40
[ 1132.826575]  ? __list_del_entry_valid.cold.1+0x34/0x48
[ 1132.827427]  ? invalid_op+0x14/0x20
[ 1132.828046]  ? __list_del_entry_valid.cold.1+0x34/0x48
[ 1132.828920]  dbuf_sync_leaf+0x391/0x660 [zfs]
[ 1132.830055]  dbuf_sync_list+0xcf/0x120 [zfs]
[ 1132.830845]  dbuf_sync_indirect+0xe2/0x170 [zfs]
[ 1132.831684]  dbuf_sync_list+0xae/0x120 [zfs]
[ 1132.832462]  dnode_sync+0x365/0xa30 [zfs]
[ 1132.833220]  ? _cond_resched+0x15/0x30
[ 1132.833869]  sync_dnodes_task+0x71/0xa0 [zfs]
[ 1132.834673]  taskq_thread+0x2e1/0x510 [spl]
[ 1132.835428]  ? wake_up_q+0x70/0x70
[ 1132.836031]  ? taskq_thread_spawn+0x50/0x50 [spl]
[ 1132.836823]  kthread+0x134/0x150
[ 1132.837407]  ? set_kthread_struct+0x50/0x50
[ 1132.838119]  ret_from_fork+0x35/0x40
[ 1132.838767] Modules linked in: osp(OE) mdd(OE) lod(OE) mdt(OE) lfsck(OE) mgs(OE) mgc(OE) osd_zfs(OE) lquota(OE) lustre(OE) mdc(OE) lov(OE) osc(OE) lmv(OE) fid(OE) fld(OE) ksocklnd(OE) ptlrpc(OE) obdclass(OE) lnet(OE) zfs(POE) zunicode(POE) zzstd(OE) zlua(OE) zavl(POE) icp(POE) zcommon(POE) znvpair(POE) spl(OE) libcfs(OE) dm_mod rpcsec_gss_krb5 auth_rpcgss nfsv4 dns_resolver nfs lockd grace fscache sunrpc intel_rapl_msr intel_rapl_common crct10dif_pclmul crc32_pclmul ghash_clmulni_intel joydev virtio_balloon pcspkr i2c_piix4 ext4 mbcache jbd2 ata_generic crc32c_intel serio_raw virtio_net ata_piix net_failover libata failover virtio_blk

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
lustre-rsync-test test_3b - onyx-147vm12 crashed during lustre-rsync-test test_3b

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
